name: equip_chestplate
description: Equip leather chestplate for torso protection
parameters: z.object({ itemName: z.string().min(1).describe("The name of the chestplate or armor piece to equip, for example 'leather_chestplate'"), destination: z.enum(['head', 'torso', 'legs', 'feet']).default('torso').describe("The armor slot to equip the item into") })

name: eat_bread_safe
description: Eat bread to restore health when in safe location (inside box or on pillar)
parameters: z.object({ count: z.number().int().min(1).max(64).default(1).describe("The maximum number of bread to consume."), stopIfFull: z.boolean().default(true).describe("If true, the bot will stop eating once its food bar reaches 20 (even if the count hasn't been reached).") })

name: build_pillar_3
description: Build a 3-block high pillar to escape melee range when under attack
parameters: z.object({ height: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(3).describe("The number of blocks to build upward in the pillar."), materialName: z.string().default("oak_planks").describe("The name of the block material to use from inventory."), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(30000).default(5000).describe("Maximum time allowed for the build before stopping.") })

name: attack_hostile_by_id
description: Attack a specific hostile mob entity ID with current weapon
parameters: z.object({ hostileEntityId: z.union([z.number().int(), z.string().min(1)]).describe("The entity ID of the hostile mob to attack"), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(8000).describe("Maximum active duration for the attack in milliseconds"), weaponName: z.string().default("stone_sword").describe("The name of the weapon to use, e.g., 'stone_sword'") })

name: retreat_50_blocks
description: Move 50 blocks away from nearest hostile threat immediately
parameters: z.object({ distanceBlocks: z.number().int().min(5).max(100).default(50).describe("Distance in blocks to move away from the nearest threat"), searchRadius: z.number().int().min(10).max(100).default(64).describe("Radius within which to search for the nearest hostile entity") })

name: shelter_with_planks
description: Build a full shelter box around current position using oak planks
parameters: z.object({ material: z.string().default("oak_planks").describe("The name of the blocks to use for the shelter, for example oak_planks"), plankCount: z.number().int().min(1).max(64).default(36).describe("Maximum number of blocks to attempt to place"), roof: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to build a roof over the shelter"), sides: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to build the side walls") })

name: shoot_arrow_at_hostile
description: Shoot arrow at hostile entity if beyond melee range (6+ blocks)
parameters: z.object({ targetEntityId: z.union([z.number().int(), z.string().min(1)]).describe("Entity ID to target with shots"), maxShots: z.number().int().min(1).max(20).default(1).describe("Total arrows to fire before ending the action"), maxRange: z.number().min(8).max(100).default(60).describe("Maximum distance to attempt a shot"), holdDrawMs: z.number().int().min(600).max(1400).default(1100).describe("Milliseconds to draw the bow for each arrow") })

name: full_box
description: Build a 3-block protective box around yourself for emergency safety
parameters: z.object({ materialName: z.string().default("oak_planks").describe("The type of block to use for the protective box"), height: z.number().int().min(2).max(4).default(3).describe("Height of the wall layers in blocks"), includeRoof: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to build a roof over the top layer") })
